{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"VacationRental","identifier":"RGVtYW5kU3RheUxpc3Rpbmc6MjA0NzIwNzg=","name":"Villa La Percha: Kayaks, Ocean Access, Pool & More","description":"Perfect for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all.\n\nAfter your booking is confirmed, you’ll be personally connected within 24 hours to one of our Elite Destination Homes reservation specialists. Supported by over 20 years of experience and premier status, they will curate every detail, guiding you","image":["https://a0.muscache.com/im/pictures/hosting/Hosting-U3RheVN1cHBse
